requirement_topic.en: EWURA Electricity Licensing, Registration, Storage, and Grid Review
requirement_topic.zh: EWURA电力许可、登记、储能和并网审查
requirement_topic.zht: EWURA電力許可、登記、儲能和併網審查

summary.en: EWURA states that the Electricity Act requires persons intending to undertake generation, transmission, distribution, supply, system operation, electricity trade, or electrical installation activities to apply for a licence unless exempted. EWURA also states that electricity activities above 1 MW are licensed and those below 1 MW are registered. A BESS used for generation integration, grid support, distribution, supply, mini-grid, customer supply, or electricity trading may therefore require EWURA licensing or registration, utility review, grid-code compliance, construction / commissioning approval, and project-specific interconnection studies.
summary.zh: EWURA说明，《电力法》要求拟从事发电、输电、配电、供电、系统运行、电力交易或电气安装活动的主体申请许可，除非获得豁免。EWURA还说明，1 MW以上电力活动发放许可，1 MW以下电力活动进行登记。因此，用于发电侧集成、电网支撑、配电、供电、微电网、用户供电或电力交易的BESS，可能需要EWURA许可或登记、公用事业单位审查、电网规范合规、建设/调试批准以及项目特定并网研究。
summary.zht: EWURA說明，《電力法》要求擬從事發電、輸電、配電、供電、系統運行、電力交易或電氣安裝活動的主體申請許可，除非獲得豁免。EWURA還說明，1 MW以上電力活動發放許可，1 MW以下電力活動進行登記。因此，用於發電側整合、電網支撐、配電、供電、微電網、用戶供電或電力交易的BESS，可能需要EWURA許可或登記、公用事業單位審查、電網規範合規、建設／調試批准以及項目特定併網研究。

standards_or_laws: EWURA electricity licensing and registration route
EWURA electricity regulatory tools, including grid and distribution codes where applicable

summary.en: China-side factory certificates, GB/T 36558-2023 system evidence, grid simulation files, relay settings, and commissioning records can support technical review but do not establish Tanzania licensing, registration, grid interconnection, tariff, PPA, land, environmental, fire, or operating approval.
summary.zh: 中国侧工厂证书、GB/T 36558-2023系统证据、并网仿真文件、继电保护整定和调试记录可支持技术审查，但不能确立坦桑尼亚许可、登记、并网、电价、PPA、土地、环境、消防或运营批准。
summary.zht: 中國側工廠證書、GB/T 36558-2023系統證據、併網仿真文件、繼電保護整定和調試記錄可支持技術審查，但不能確立坦尚尼亞許可、登記、併網、電價、PPA、土地、環境、消防或營運批准。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific China grid and commissioning evidence

gap.en: Separate product import compliance from project authorization. Prepare a Tanzania regulatory memo showing whether the BESS is behind-the-meter, grid-connected, generation-integrated, distribution-connected, mini-grid, stand-alone, or used for supply / trading, then identify EWURA, utility, PPA, land, environmental, fire, construction, and commissioning approvals before energization.
gap.zh: 应区分产品进口合规与项目授权。应准备坦桑尼亚监管备忘录，说明BESS是表后、并网、发电侧集成、配电侧接入、微电网、独立系统，还是用于供电/交易，并在送电前识别EWURA、公用事业单位、PPA、土地、环境、消防、建设和调试批准。
gap.zht: 應區分產品進口合規與項目授權。應準備坦尚尼亞監管備忘錄，說明BESS是錶後、併網、發電側整合、配電側接入、微電網、獨立系統，還是用於供電／交易，並在送電前識別EWURA、公用事業單位、PPA、土地、環境、消防、建設和調試批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the BESS activity falls within Tanzania electricity licensing, registration, electrical installation, grid-code, supply, trading, mini-grid, or project-approval requirements; not a universal standalone product certificate
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic grid and project approvals are not substitutes for Tanzania EWURA / utility / project approvals

source.publisher: Energy and Water Utilities Regulatory Authority (EWURA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EWURA and utility obligations should be scoped by the Tanzania project use case. TBS CoC, IEC evidence, or China GB reports do not by themselves authorize a grid-connected or licensed BESS activity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EWURA和公用事业单位义务应按坦桑尼亚项目用途确定。TBS CoC、IEC证据或中国GB报告本身不能授权并网或需许可的BESS活动。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EWURA和公用事業單位義務應按坦尚尼亞項目用途確定。TBS CoC、IEC證據或中國GB報告本身不能授權併網或需許可的BESS活動。
